## Problem

What problem or use case should this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the desired behavior or API.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives or workarounds.

## Scope

Which area is affected?

- Upload
- File management
- Parsing
- LLM integration
- Tenant isolation
- Deployment
- Documentation
- Other

## Additional Context

Add examples, diagrams, payloads, or references if useful.
